hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(env|key|pem|secret)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to edit sensitive file'; exit 2; fi
